title: Roadside Shops
description: Dive deeper into the seller's side with Roadside shops! With newspaper sponsor system.
body:
![RoadsideShops](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/roadsideshops.png?raw=true)
![Landscape](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/landscape.png?raw=true) Inspired by Hay Day's sales method, Roadside Shops from a new method to trade between players! Each player has his or her own shop where they can offer their items for sale. Your choice of sponsored item will be key to getting noticed and attracting new customers! There is a newspaper where you can see other players' sponsored items. ## ReadyToTest zip Download in one zip everything you need to test RoadsideShops going in one click! The zip will contain: - Vault v1.7.3 - [SimpleEconomy](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/SimpleEconomy) v1.0.2 - RoadsideShops v1.1.21 Click [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/roadside-shops/version/1.1.21) for the download! > Note! **SimpleEconomy** was released in order to be able to test RoadsideShops quickly. It is recommended to use another economy plugin of your choice that is compatible with Vault.

![Features](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/features.png?raw=true)
- Keep your community entertained with something different. - Easy to configure with all customizable text. [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) required. - Fast and secure with Sqlite. - Make sales slots obtainable and unlockable. - API for dev and support/help on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/KRS7dSU6tR).
![commands](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/commands.png?raw=true)
/roadsideshop [player] - Open your/player shop. /newspaper - Open the newspaper. /roadsideshopsadmin - Open player shop to edit it.
![commands](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/permissions.png?raw=true)
```yml permissions: roadsideshops.admin.sponsortimebypass: description: bypass sponsor time default: op roadsideshops.admin.editshops: description: permission to edit the shops of others with command /roadsideshopsadmin default: op roadsideshops.shopcommand: description: open shop GUI default: true roadsideshops.newspapercommand: description: open newspaper GUI default: true ```
![devs](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/RoadsideShops/blob/master/imgs/fordev.png?raw=true)
```xml escanortargaryen https://nexus.frengor.com/repository/escanortargaryen-public/ it.escanortargaryen roadsideshops 1.1.21 provided ``` [bstat](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Roadside%20Shops/17468)
